14 CLINICAL STUDIES In a 12-week clinical trial of patients with open-angle glaucoma or ocular hypertension with a mean baseline IOP of 23 to 24 mmHg, the IOP-lowering effect of ZOLYMBUS once daily (in the evening) was non-inferior to preserved bimatoprost ophthalmic solution 0.01%.
